---
name: Maintenance task
about: Track operational, docs, workflow, or repo hygiene work
title: "chore: "
labels: maintenance
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should be improved?

## Scope

- [ ] Code
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Workflow
- [ ] Release
- [ ] Security

## Done When

- [ ] The change is small and reviewable.
- [ ] The affected command or workflow has been checked.
- [ ] Notes are added to docs or changelog if useful.
